chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1208 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 4725/24 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 4726/24 4.For orders on CMA 4727/24 5.For hearing of main case. 28-08-2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Office objections is deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. Counsel for petitioner states that without assigning any reason or confronting to the petitioner, impugned Order dated 13.08.2024 has been issued merely on the ground that petitioner did not attend Rain Flood Emergency meeting of district Disaster Management Authority, which in fact, was not a meeting rather a tour programme of a concerned minister. Per learned counsel, petitioner had already authorized other official of the Municipal Committee in relation to such programme, for which documents available at pages-21 to 25 are evidently proving the case of the petitioner. He states that petitioner has been condemned un-heard and adverse order has been passed against him. Issue notices to respondents as well as AAG for 26.09.2024. In the meanwhile, operation of impugned order (available at page-17) to remain suspended till next date of hearing. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
